title: `trls doctor` command — repo health checks D1-D6
definition_of_done: trls doctor runs D1 git/trellis divergence (warning), D2 stale claims (warning), D3 orphaned ops (error), D4 broken parent refs (error), D5 dependency cycles (error), D6 uncited issues (warning); exits non-zero on error-severity; --strict promotes warnings to errors; --format json works; Repo Health section added to docs/SKILL.md; trls doctor added to worker-init step in docs/trls-worker-SKILL.md; tests pass; make check green
